function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT
  "d"."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year",
  SUM("s"."Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue",
  SUM("s"."Total Product Cost") AS "total_cost",
  SUM("s"."Sales Amount") - SUM("s"."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit",
  100.0 * (SUM("s"."Sales Amount") - SUM("s"."Total Product Cost")) / NULLIF(SUM("s"."Sales Amount"), 0) AS "gross_margin_pct",

FROM "Sales" AS "s"
JOIN "Date" AS "d"
  ON "s"."OrderDateKey" = "d"."DateKey"
GROUP BY
  "d"."Fiscal Year"
ORDER BY
  "d"."Fiscal Year" ASC;"}

  soh."Channel" AS "Channel",

questionLabel: [Q4][medium] List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH product_sales AS (
  SELECT
    p."Product" AS "Product",
    p."Category" AS "Category",
    p."Subcategory" AS "Subcategory",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "revenue",
    SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit"
  FROM "Sales" s
  JOIN "Product" p
    ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
  GROUP BY
    p."Product",
    p."Category",
    p."Subcategory"
)
SELECT
  "Product",
  "Category",
  "Subcategory",
  "revenue",
  "units_sold",
  "gross_profit",
  CASE
    WHEN "revenue" = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ("gross_profit" / "revenue") * 100
  END AS "margin_pct"
FROM product_sales
ORDER BY "revenue" DESC
LIMIT 10;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT
  c."Customer" AS "Customer",
  c."City" AS "City",
  c."State-Province" AS "State-Province",
  c."Country-Region" AS "Country-Region",
  COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS "total_orders",
  COUNT(*) AS "total_line_items",
  SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "total_units",
  SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "lifetime_revenue",

JOIN "Customer" c
  ON c."CustomerKey" = s."CustomerKey"
JOIN "Sales_Order" so
  ON so."SalesOrderLineKey" = s."SalesOrderLineKey"
WHERE so."Channel" = 'Direct'
  AND s."CustomerKey" <> -1
GROUP BY
  c."Customer",
  c."City",
  c."State-Province",
  c."Country-Region"
ORDER BY "lifetime_revenue" DESC
LIMIT 15;"}

Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    r."Business Type" AS "Business Type",
    r."ResellerKey" AS "ResellerKey",
    s."Sales Amount" AS "Sales Amount",
    s."Total Product Cost" AS "Total Product Cost"
  FROM "Sales" AS s
  JOIN "Reseller" AS r
    ON r."ResellerKey" = s."ResellerKey"
  JOIN "Sales_Order" AS so
    ON so."SalesOrderLineKey" = s."SalesOrderLineKey"
  WHERE so."Channel" = 'Reseller'
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    "Business Type",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "ResellerKey") AS "reseller_count",
    SUM("Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue",
    SUM("Sales Amount" - "Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit"
  FROM base
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  "Business Type",
  "reseller_count",
  "total_revenue",
  "total_revenue" / NULLIF("reseller_count", 0) AS "revenue_per_reseller",
  "gross_profit",
  ("gross_profit" / NULLIF("total_revenue", 0)) * 100.0 AS "margin_pct"
FROM agg
ORDER BY "total_revenue" DESC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH revenue_by_year_channel_category AS (
  SELECT
    so."Channel" AS "Channel",
    p."Category" AS "Category",
    CAST(d."Fiscal Year" AS INTEGER) AS "Fiscal Year",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "Revenue"
  FROM "Sales" s
  JOIN "Sales_Order" so
    ON so."SalesOrderLineKey" = s."SalesOrderLineKey"
  JOIN "Product" p
    ON p."ProductKey" = s."ProductKey"
  JOIN "Date" d
    ON d."DateKey" = s."OrderDateKey"
  GROUP BY
    so."Channel",
    p."Category",
    CAST(d."Fiscal Year" AS INTEGER)
), with_prior AS (
  SELECT
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "Fiscal Year" AS "current_year",
    "Revenue" AS "current_revenue",
    LAG("Fiscal Year") OVER (
      PARTITION BY "Channel", "Category"
      ORDER BY "Fiscal Year" ASC
    ) AS "prior_year",
    LAG("Revenue") OVER (
      PARTITION BY "Channel", "Category"
      ORDER BY "Fiscal Year" ASC
    ) AS "prior_revenue"
  FROM revenue_by_year_channel_category
)
SELECT
  "Channel",
  "Category",
  "prior_year" AS "prior_year",
  "prior_revenue" AS "prior_revenue",
  "current_year" AS "current_year",
  "current_revenue" AS "current_revenue",
  CASE
    WHEN "prior_revenue" IS NULL OR "prior_revenue" = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ("current_revenue" - "prior_revenue") * 100.0 / "prior_revenue"
  END AS "yoy_growth_pct"
FROM with_prior
WHERE "prior_year" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
  "Channel" ASC,
  "Category" ASC,
  "prior_year" ASC;"}

questionLabel: [Q21][hard] Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT
  so."Channel" AS "Channel",
  p."Category" AS "Category",
  SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue",
  SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold",
  SUM(s."Sales Amount") / NULLIF(SUM(s."Order Quantity"), 0) AS "revenue_per_unit",
  AVG(p."List Price") AS "avg_list_price",
  (1 - (SUM(s."Sales Amount") / NULLIF(SUM(s."Order Quantity"), 0)) / NULLIF(AVG(p."List Price"), 0)) * 100 AS "realized_discount_pct",
  SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit",
  (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) / NULLIF(SUM(s."Sales Amount"), 0) * 100 AS "margin_pct"
FROM "Sales" s
JOIN "Sales_Order" so
  ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
JOIN "Product" p
  ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
GROUP BY
  so."Channel",
  p."Category"
ORDER BY
  so."Channel" ASC,
  "total_revenue" DESC;"}

questionLabel: [Q22][hard] Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH sales_with_dims AS (
  SELECT
    "so"."Channel" AS "Channel",
    "p"."Category" AS "Category",
    "d"."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year",
    "d"."Fiscal Quarter" AS "Fiscal Quarter",
    "d"."DateKey" AS "DateKey",
    "s"."Sales Amount" AS "Sales Amount"
  FROM "Sales" AS "s"
  JOIN "Sales_Order" AS "so"
    ON "s"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "so"."SalesOrderLineKey"
  JOIN "Product" AS "p"
    ON "s"."ProductKey" = "p"."ProductKey"
  JOIN "Date" AS "d"
    ON "s"."OrderDateKey" = "d"."DateKey"
), quarter_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "Fiscal Year",
    "Fiscal Quarter",
    SUM("Sales Amount") AS "Revenue"
  FROM sales_with_dims
  GROUP BY
    "Channel", "Category", "Fiscal Year", "Fiscal Quarter"
), quarter_ranked AS (
  SELECT
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "Fiscal Year" AS "current_fiscal_year",
    "Fiscal Quarter" AS "current_fiscal_quarter",
    "Revenue" AS "current_revenue",
    (CAST("Fiscal Year" AS INTEGER) * 10 + CAST(REPLACE("Fiscal Quarter", 'Q', '') AS INTEGER)) AS "quarter_sort_key"
  FROM quarter_revenue
), with_prior AS (
  SELECT
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "current_fiscal_year" AS "current_year",
    "current_fiscal_quarter" AS "current_quarter_label",
    "current_fiscal_year" || ' ' || "current_fiscal_quarter" AS "current_quarter",
    "current_revenue",
    LAG("current_fiscal_year" || ' ' || "current_fiscal_quarter") OVER (
      PARTITION BY "Channel", "Category"
      ORDER BY "quarter_sort_key"
    ) AS "prior_quarter",
    LAG("current_revenue") OVER (
      PARTITION BY "Channel", "Category"
      ORDER BY "quarter_sort_key"
    ) AS "prior_revenue"
  FROM quarter_ranked
)
SELECT
  "Channel",
  "Category",
  "prior_quarter",
  "prior_revenue",
  "current_quarter",
  "current_revenue",
  (CASE
    WHEN "prior_revenue" IS NULL OR "prior_revenue" = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ("current_revenue" - "prior_revenue") / "prior_revenue" * 100
  END) AS "qoq_growth_pct"
FROM with_prior
WHERE "prior_quarter" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
  "Channel" ASC,
  "Category" ASC,
  "prior_quarter" ASC;"}

questionLabel: [Q22][hard] Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH sales_with_dims AS (
  SELECT
    "so"."Channel" AS "Channel",
    "p"."Category" AS "Category",
    "d"."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year",
    "d"."Fiscal Quarter" AS "Fiscal Quarter",
    "s"."Sales Amount" AS "Sales Amount"
  FROM "Sales" AS "s"
  JOIN "Sales_Order" AS "so"
    ON "s"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "so"."SalesOrderLineKey"
  JOIN "Product" AS "p"
    ON "s"."ProductKey" = "p"."ProductKey"
  JOIN "Date" AS "d"
    ON "s"."OrderDateKey" = "d"."DateKey"
), quarter_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "Fiscal Year",
    "Fiscal Quarter",
    SUM("Sales Amount") AS "Revenue"
  FROM sales_with_dims
  GROUP BY
    "Channel", "Category", "Fiscal Year", "Fiscal Quarter"
), quarter_ranked AS (
  SELECT
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "Fiscal Year" AS "current_fiscal_year",
    "Fiscal Quarter" AS "current_fiscal_quarter",
    "Revenue" AS "current_revenue",
    ("Fiscal Year") AS "fiscal_year_sort_key",
    CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT("Fiscal Quarter", '[0-9]+', 0) AS INTEGER) AS "fiscal_quarter_num"
  FROM quarter_revenue
), with_prior AS (
  SELECT
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "current_fiscal_year" || ' ' || "current_fiscal_quarter" AS "current_quarter",
    "current_fiscal_quarter" AS "current_quarter_label",
    "current_fiscal_year" AS "current_year",
    "current_revenue" AS "current_revenue",
    LAG("current_fiscal_year" || ' ' || "current_fiscal_quarter") OVER (
      PARTITION BY "Channel", "Category"
      ORDER BY (CAST(REPLACE("fiscal_year_sort_key", 'FY', '') AS INTEGER) * 10 + "fiscal_quarter_num")
    ) AS "prior_quarter",
    LAG("current_revenue") OVER (
      PARTITION BY "Channel", "Category"
      ORDER BY (CAST(REPLACE("fiscal_year_sort_key", 'FY', '') AS INTEGER) * 10 + "fiscal_quarter_num")
    ) AS "prior_revenue"
  FROM quarter_ranked
)
SELECT
  "Channel",
  "Category",
  "prior_quarter",
  "prior_revenue",
  "current_quarter",
  "current_revenue",
  (CASE
    WHEN "prior_revenue" IS NULL OR "prior_revenue" = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ("current_revenue" - "prior_revenue") / "prior_revenue" * 100
  END) AS "qoq_growth_pct"
FROM with_prior
WHERE "prior_quarter" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
  "Channel" ASC,
  "Category" ASC,
  "prior_quarter" ASC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH category_subcat AS (
  SELECT
    p."Category" AS "Category",
    p."Subcategory" AS "Subcategory",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "revenue",
    SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit"
  FROM "Sales" s
  JOIN "Product" p
    ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
  GROUP BY
    p."Category",
    p."Subcategory"
), category_totals AS (
  SELECT
    "Category",
    SUM("revenue") AS "category_revenue"
  FROM category_subcat
  GROUP BY "Category"
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    cs."Category",
    cs."Subcategory",
    cs."revenue",
    cs."units_sold",
    cs."gross_profit",
    ct."category_revenue",
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (
      PARTITION BY cs."Category"
      ORDER BY cs."revenue" DESC, cs."Subcategory" ASC
    ) AS "revenue_rank"
  FROM category_subcat cs
  JOIN category_totals ct
    ON cs."Category" = ct."Category"
)
SELECT
  "Category" AS "Category",
  "revenue_rank" AS "revenue_rank",
  "Subcategory" AS "Subcategory",
  "revenue" AS "revenue",
  "units_sold" AS "units_sold",
  "gross_profit" AS "gross_profit",
  ("revenue" / NULLIF("category_revenue", 0)) * 100.0 AS "category_revenue_share_pct"
FROM ranked
WHERE "revenue_rank" <= 2
ORDER BY
  "Category" ASC,
  "revenue_rank" ASC,
  "Subcategory" ASC;"}

questionLabel: [Q24][hard] Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    so."Channel" AS "Channel",
    p."Category" AS "Category",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "revenue",
    COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS "orders",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit"
  FROM "Sales" s
  JOIN "Sales_Order" so
    ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
  JOIN "Product" p
    ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
  GROUP BY
    so."Channel",
    p."Category"
),
channel_totals AS (
  SELECT
    "Channel",
    SUM("revenue") AS "channel_revenue"
  FROM base
  GROUP BY "Channel"
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    b."Channel" AS "Channel",
    b."Category" AS "Category",
    b."revenue" AS "revenue",
    b."orders" AS "orders",
    b."gross_profit" AS "gross_profit",
    (b."revenue" * 100.0 / ct."channel_revenue") AS "channel_revenue_share_pct",
    SUM(b."revenue") OVER (
      PARTITION BY b."Channel"
      ORDER BY b."revenue" DESC, b."Category" ASC
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) * 100.0 / ct."channel_revenue" AS "cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct"
  FROM base b
  JOIN channel_totals ct
    ON b."Channel" = ct."Channel"
)
SELECT
  "Channel",
  "Category",
  "revenue",
  "channel_revenue_share_pct",
  "cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct",
  "orders",
  "gross_profit"
FROM ranked
ORDER BY
  "Channel" ASC,
  "revenue" DESC,
  "Category" ASC;"}
